name: Passion Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 oz Duncan Hines® Moist Deluxe White Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the bottom and sides of a clay pot in water for at least 15 minutes.
2. To prepare the batter, combine cake mix, lemon gelatin powder, vanilla extract, whipped egg whites, water, and olive oil in a mixing bowl.
3. Line the bottom and sides of the pot with waxed paper. Cover, and place in a cold oven.
4. Set the temperature to 400°F (200°C). Bake for 45 minutes or until the springs back when touched.
5. Meanwhile, prepare the topping by combining thawed passion fruit juice, sifted powdered sugar, lemon juice, and water in a saucepan.
6. Stir over medium heat until the sugar has dissolved. Remove the cake from the oven.
7. Prick the top all over with a fork and immediately pour the passion fruit juice mixture over it.
Note: Recipe By: Cooking In Clay
